ocr_findings.description: Section heading marker rendered as '## 0●' in OCR; image shows '●●' (double orange bullet). Cosmetic rendering difference only.

reviewer_notes: Page covers 関係データベース 行と列 section. Main data table (学生番号/学生名/電話番号) is rendered as an image (img-0.jpeg) so table content is not in OCR text — acceptable since it is diagram-style. All prose and bullet points faithfully captured. Minor heading symbol garbling only.
